sql_array: INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('number: 1, number: 2, number: 3');
SELECT extractAll(data, '\\d+') AS matches FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET data = 'number: 4, number: 5' WHERE data = 'number: 1, number: 2, number: 3';
SELECT extractAll(data, 'number: (\\d+)') AS number_matches FROM test_strings;
